channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Jack Black and Jack White Perform ‘Seven Nation Army’ Together During ‘SNL’ Monologue
item.description: 🎸 The ultimate Jack duo rocked 'Seven Nation Army’ on SNL! Check out this epic collab! 🔥 #JackBlack #JackWhite #SNLmoment

item.title: Jack White Lets It Rip on SNL: Watch
item.description: 🎸🔥 Jack White rocked the SNL stage like a legend! Hit play and feel the energy! 🤘 #JackWhite #SNL #RockNRoll

item.title: Michigan vs. Arizona: Where to Watch the March Madness Final Four Game Online
item.description: 🎶 Hoops showdown meets music showdown! Detroit rock vs. Arizona groove – catch the Final Four online! 🏀🎸 #MarchMadness #FinalFour

item.title: Lords of Acid Enlist Princess Superstar for “Karaoke Superstar,” First New Song in Eight Years: Stream
item.description: 🎤 Dive into the infectious energy of Lords of Acid and Princess Superstar's collab! 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #KaraokeSuperstar 🎶🔥

item.title: Kanye West Brings Out Lauryn Hill and Travis Scott for Wild Second Night in L.A.
item.description: 🔥 Kanye West, Lauryn Hill, and Travis Scott lit up L.A.! Who else needs a concert ASAP? 🌟 #MusicMagic
